name: Le Soufre-Noir
description: Volcan ambulant crachant des nuages toxiques de soufre et de cendres. Son passage assombrit le ciel sur des centaines de kilomètres, suffoquant tout ce qui respire.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, epic scale. A colossal walking volcanic creature, part mountain part beast, constantly erupting clouds of black smoke and yellow sulfur gas from its crater-like head. Its body is dark volcanic stone with rivers of yellow-tinged magma. The sky behind it is choked with toxic ash clouds. Smaller rocky creatures flee from its toxic breath. Atmospheric, cinematic, highly detailed.
